verifications.evidence: inputSchema validation added to executeAgentStep() in step-agent.ts. 5 tests covering: valid input passes, missing required field fails with agent-naming error, agents without inputSchema skip validation (backward compat), empty input against required fields fails. 627/0 pass/fail across full suite at v0.11.1.

criteria_results.criterion: executeAgentStep validates input against agent.inputSchema when both are present
criteria_results.evidence: step-agent.ts:104-118 — validate(agentSpec.inputSchema, inputData) called after resolvedInput, before compileAgentSpec

criteria_results.criterion: Step fails with clear error message naming the agent and listing validation errors
criteria_results.evidence: Test 'fails with clear error message naming the agent when input schema validation fails' asserts error includes agent name and missing field

criteria_results.criterion: Agents without inputSchema skip validation (backward compatible)
criteria_results.evidence: Test 'skips validation when agent has no inputSchema' — completes with status: completed

criteria_results.criterion: Steps providing no input to an agent with required schema fields fail
criteria_results.evidence: Test 'fails when no input provided to agent with required schema fields' — status: failed

criteria_results.criterion: Test covers: valid input passes, missing required field fails, extra field passes
criteria_results.evidence: 4 test cases in step-agent.test.ts covering all scenarios

criteria_results.criterion: resumable-analysis.workflow.yaml and pausable-analysis.workflow.yaml fixed to pass all 3 required synthesizer fields (or synthesizer schema relaxed)
criteria_results.evidence: Synthesizer schema was not relaxed and workflows were not updated — task-002 (audit all callers) remains planned. This criterion was deferred, not addressed.
